# Folder Map

## `00_START_HERE/`
Orientation, thesis, scope, how to read the vault.

## `01_CORE_THESIS_AND_FRAMEWORKS/`
Core theory: proxy signals, the five signal layers, the signal-to-value pipeline, ethics boundaries, harms, and research gaps.

## `02_DOMAIN_MAP/`
Domain-level overviews: creator economy, reputation systems, search, ads, app stores, music, startups, UI/dark patterns, technical platforms, marketplaces.

## `03_TACTIC_CARDS/`
Detailed mechanism cards. Each card follows the same structure: signal corrupted, conceptual methodology, evidence, ethical boundary, red flags, research questions.

## `04_CASE_STUDIES/`
Source-backed case files, each with evidence strength and slide/paper use.

## `05_DETECTION_FORENSICS/`
Research workflows: red flags, source audits, case coding, network coordination, content similarity, attribution anomalies, legal-safe evidence collection.

## `06_LAW_POLICY_PLATFORM_RULES/`
Regulator and platform-policy notes.

## `07_PAPER_SLIDES_OUTPUTS/`
Paper outline, abstract versions, 40-slide deck outline, speaker notes, argument map, and bibliography groupings.

## `08_TEMPLATES/`
Reusable templates for future source notes, case studies, evidence memos, and slide drafts.

## `09_SOURCE_INDEX/`
Citation bank, source summaries, evidence tier map.

## `10_APPENDICES/`
Glossary, timeline, limitations, unresolved research questions, and extended taxonomy.
